name: Aras PLM Open Platform REST API
what_it_does: Aras PLM open platform REST API for discrete manufacturers, aerospace and defense contractors, and automotive OEMs to manage product lifecycle — including bill of materials, engineering change management, document control, configuration management, and program management — through Aras's open-source-based enterprise PLM platform with a flexible low-code data model. Enables AI agents to manage bill of materials for engineering BOM hierarchy automation, handle engineering change for design change workflow automation, access document control for technical documentation management automation, retrieve configuration management for product baseline and variant automation, manage program for product development milestone automation, handle requirements traceability for engineering specification linkage automation, access quality for non-conformance and CAPA automation, retrieve supplier collaboration for component qualification automation, manage CAD data for mechanical design integration automation, and integrate Aras with ERP, MES, and CAD systems for end-to-end digital thread automation.
use_cases: Managing engineering bill of materials and change orders for aerospace manufacturer PLM automation agents
Implementing digital thread from requirements through design to manufacturing for defense contractor automation agents
Automating document control and configuration management for regulated manufacturer compliance automation agents
Integrating Aras PLM with ERP and MES for product data synchronization automation agents
not_for: Process manufacturers without discrete engineering BOMs (Aras focuses on discrete manufacturing PLM)
Consumer goods without complex engineering (Aras targets aerospace, automotive, industrial complexity)
Simple document management (Aras is full PLM, not a document management system)
best_when: An aerospace, defense, automotive, or industrial manufacturer wanting AI agents to manage product lifecycle from requirements through design, change management, and configuration control through Aras's open and customizable PLM platform.
avoid_when: IMPLEMENTATION AND CUSTOMIZATION REQUIRED: Aras PLM requires configuration and customization for each customer; automated generic PLM API assumption creates customer-specific schema differences; automated must understand each deployment's data model customizations. LOW-CODE DATA MODEL IS DYNAMIC: Aras's low-code platform means each deployment has custom ItemTypes and relationships; automated hardcoded schema assumption creates missing_itemtype for custom entities; automated must query Aras metadata API for schema before data access. SELF-HOSTED OR CLOUD BOTH SUPPORTED: Aras runs on-premise or cloud; automated cloud-only assumption creates endpoint_configuration_required for on-premise deployments; automated must configure for specific deployment type. ENGINEERING EXPERTISE NEEDED: PLM data models require aerospace or automotive engineering domain expertise; automated non-expert PLM configuration assumption creates incorrectly structured product data; automated must involve engineering professionals in Aras configuration.

auth.notes: Aras uses OAuth2 + basic auth for PLM REST API. REST API with JSON/XML. Andover, MA HQ. Founded 2000 by Peter Schroer. Products: Aras Innovator (PLM), Aras Engineering (change management), Aras Manufacturing (MES integration), Aras Quality. SDKs: JS/Python/C# Aras connector. Open-source core (Aras Innovator on GitHub). Enterprise subscription. Backed by Accel-KKR (PE). Competes with PTC Windchill and Siemens Teamcenter for enterprise PLM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Open-source Aras Innovator community edition available; production enterprise requires subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription per user; professional services; cloud hosting options; support tiers
pricing.notes: Andover MA. Accel-KKR PE. Open-source + enterprise subscription. PLM. Aerospace/automotive/defense focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; query and transaction APIs vary by deployment

known_agent_gotchas: DYNAMIC DATA MODEL REQUIRES METADATA QUERY: Aras PLM schema is configurable; automated hardcoded ItemType assumption creates unknown_itemtype for custom entities; automated must query /server/odata/$metadata endpoint to discover current data model before API calls

AMLQUERY IS PROPRIETARY: Aras uses AML (Aras Markup Language) for complex queries; automated standard REST query assumption creates limited_query_capability for complex BOM traversal; automated must learn AML syntax for complex product structure queries

LIFECYCLE STATE MACHINE: Aras items follow configurable lifecycle states (design, review, released, obsolete); automated direct update assumption creates invalid_lifecycle_transition; automated must follow lifecycle promotion rules

RELATIONSHIP TRAVERSAL IS COMPLEX: Aras BOM and relationship traversal requires explicit relationship queries; automated flat data assumption creates missing parent-child context for BOM hierarchies; automated must traverse Aras relationships explicitly

ITAR CONTROLS MAY APPLY: Aerospace/defense Aras deployments may have ITAR data access controls; automated unrestricted access assumption creates access_denied for ITAR-controlled design data; automated must implement ITAR-aware access controls
agent_readiness.security_notes: PLM platform. ITAR, EAR, AS9100, CMMC, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Product design, BOM, and engineering data.

security_score_components.security_notes: PLM. ITAR, EAR, CMMC. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Defense and aerospace engineering data.
